mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.status AS "status", s.ai_escalation_enabled AS "aiEscalationEnabled", s.doctor_last_active_at AS "doctorLastActiveAt", s.creation_time AS "creationTime", r.real_name AS "realName", r.case_number AS "caseNumber" FROM follow_up_communication_session s INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = s.register_id WHERE s.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.status AS "status", s.ai_escalation_enabled AS "aiEscalationEnabled", s.doctor_last_active_at AS "doctorLastActiveAt", s.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_communication_session s WHERE s.register_id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id AS "id", m.session_id AS "sessionId", m.sender_type AS "senderType", m.message_type AS "messageType", m.content AS "content", m.summary_id AS "summaryId", m.workflow_run_id AS "workflowRunId", m.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_communication_message m WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY m.creation_time ASC, m.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_communication_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}

SELECT cs.id AS "id", cs.register_id AS "registerId", cs.session_id AS "sessionId", cs.ai_draft_content AS "aiDraftContent", cs.ai_medical_advice AS "aiMedicalAdvice", cs.ai_risk_alerts AS "aiRiskAlerts", cs.doctor_content AS "doctorContent", cs.status AS "status", cs.shared_to_patient AS "sharedToPatient", cs.workflow_run_id AS "workflowRunId", cs.model_id AS "modelId", cs.approved_by AS "approvedBy", cs.approved_at AS "approvedAt", cs.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_case_summary cs WHERE cs.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY cs.creation_time DESC, cs.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT cs.id AS "id", cs.register_id AS "registerId", cs.session_id AS "sessionId", cs.ai_draft_content AS "aiDraftContent", cs.ai_medical_advice AS "aiMedicalAdvice", cs.ai_risk_alerts AS "aiRiskAlerts", cs.doctor_content AS "doctorContent", cs.status AS "status", cs.shared_to_patient AS "sharedToPatient", cs.workflow_run_id AS "workflowRunId", cs.model_id AS "modelId", cs.approved_by AS "approvedBy", cs.approved_at AS "approvedAt", cs.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM follow_up_case_summary cs WHERE cs.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE follow_up_case_summary SET doctor_content = #{doctorContent}, status = #{status}, shared_to_patient = #{sharedToPatient}, approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = #{approvedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT deptment_id AS "departmentId" FROM register WHERE id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT symptom_relief AS "symptomRelief", has_side_effect AS "hasSideEffect", patient_feedback AS "patientFeedback", ai_assessment AS "aiAssessment", ai_advice AS "aiAdvice", follow_up_time AS "followUpTime" FROM ai_follow_up_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY follow_up_time DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id AS "id", observation_date AS "observationDate" FROM follow_up_daily_observation WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND observation_date = #{date} LIMIT 1
